recommendations.title: The Gunfighter
recommendations.overview: The fastest gun in the West tries to escape his reputation.

recommendations.title: Jesse James
recommendations.overview: After railroad agents forcibly evict the James family from their family farm, Jesse and Frank turn to banditry for revenge.

recommendations.title: Twelve O'Clock High
recommendations.overview: In the early days of daylight bombing raids over Germany, General Frank Savage must take command of a 'hard luck' bomber group. Much of the story deals with his struggle to whip his group into a disciplined fighting unit in spite of heavy losses, and

recommendations.title: The Bravados
recommendations.overview: Jim Douglass arrives in the small town of Rio Arriba in order to witness the hanging of the four men he believes murdered his wife. When the convicts escape, Jim tracks them into Mexico, determined to see that justice is done. But the farther Jim goe

recommendations.title: The Tale of The Princess Kaguya
recommendations.overview: Found inside a shining stalk of bamboo by an old bamboo cutter and his wife, a tiny girl grows rapidly into an exquisite young lady. The mysterious young princess enthrals all who encounter her. But, ultimately, she must confront her fate.

recommendations.title: Fatima
recommendations.overview: In 1917, outside the parish of Fátima, Portugal, a 10-year-old girl and her two younger cousins witness multiple visitations of the Virgin Mary, who tells them that only prayer and suffering will bring an end to World War I.  As secularist government

recommendations.title: A Dog's Will
recommendations.overview: The lively João Grilo and the sly Chicó are poor guys living in the hinterland who cheat a bunch of people in a small town in Northeastern Brazil. When they die, they have to be judged by Christ, the Devil and the Virgin Mary before they are admitted

recommendations.title: When Marnie Was There
recommendations.overview: Upon being sent to live with relatives in the countryside due to an illness, an emotionally distant adolescent girl becomes obsessed with an abandoned mansion and infatuated with a girl who lives there - a girl who may or may not be real.

recommendations.title: Rushmore

recommendations.title: Baraka
recommendations.overview: A paralysingly beautiful documentary with a global vision—an odyssey through landscape and time—that attempts to capture the essence of life.
